boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: procurement exception matches contract amendment.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: contract amendment must cover invoice line and date

critical_features_preserved: contract amendment must cover invoice line and date
final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The controlling control record says the needed contract amendment is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently, and policy requires closed source-control before execution. Prior vendor history and urgency are not authority, so the action should not proceed.
